title: Spring Real Estate Season in Boone NC: What to Do Now
excerpt: Spring is the most active season for Boone NC real estate, and the window to get ahead of the competition is right now. Whether you're buying, selling, or just starting to think about mountain property NC, local REALTOR Andrew Plyler breaks down exactly what to do this March.
image_alt: King Street in downtown Boone NC on a sunny spring day
